contract_claim: Docstring says 'Mock adapter uses simple scope names' but getLocalScopeName returns ['Local', 'Locals']. Meanwhile, extractLocalVariables (L51-55) ignores scope names entirely and simply takes the first scope by array index, making getLocalScopeName effectively unused by the extractLocalVariables implementation in the same file.
observed_behavior: Docstring says 'Mock adapter uses simple scope names' but getLocalScopeName returns ['Local', 'Locals'].
